title: AquaLog: Smart Water Tracker
subtitle: AI Hydration & Caffeine Tracker
promotional_text: The intelligent hydration app. Track caffeine half-life, see alcohol's dehydration impact, unlock research-backed health milestones. Free core tracking, AI insights with Pro.
whats_new:
Introducing the Body Intelligence Engine.

- Caffeine half-life tracker — see exactly when it leaves your system
- Alcohol dehydration calculator — know how much extra water you need
- Health Timeline — research-cited milestones at days 3, 7, 14, 30, 90
- Smart notifications that adapt to your progress
- Apple Watch app with complications
- Siri Shortcuts — "Hey Siri, I had a glass of wine"
- 23 beverages with full nutrition data
- New pricing: $1.99/mo, $9.99/yr, or $19.99 lifetime
